title: Find the hole, and fill the hole
html:
March 2021 Yahir founder-axiom: "Find the hole, and fill the hole." Title-as-thesis market-gap framing, sibling to the May 2020 "tap into the 97%" and the later disruption / nonobvious cluster. Body adds an unrelated mini-golf line and a phone number (orphan stack).

yahir gonzalez · disruption · nonobvious · 2020 05 09 find a way to tap into the 97

related.label: Find a way to tap into the 97%
